executives.name: Benjamin Salter
executives.background: Mr. Salter is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate finance. He previously served as the Vice President, Finance of the Company.

executives.name: Leigh Curyer
executives.background: Mr. Curyer is the founder, President, and CEO of NexGen Energy Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector.
